achievements.title: Yep, It Ain't Moving
achievements.description: [Standard - Marathon] Attempt to rotate a Square Block
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Infinite Rotating
achievements.description: [Standard - Marathon] Rotate the same piece 100 times
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Back-To-Back Tetris
achievements.description: [Standard - Marathon] Clear four lines at once two times in a row
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Triple Tetris
achievements.description: [Standard - Marathon] Clear four lines at once three times in a row
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Tetris to the Power of Two
achievements.description: [Standard - Marathon] Clear four lines at once four times in a row
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: S/Z Spin
achievements.description: [Standard - Marathon] Clear 3 lines with a S or a Z piece
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Back-To-Back T-Spin Triple
achievements.description: [Standard - Marathon] Clear 3 lines twice in a row with a T piece
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: DT Cannon
achievements.description: [Standard - Marathon] Clear 2 lines with a T piece, and then 3 lines with a T piece without clearing other lines
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: That Was Close
achievements.description: [Standard - Marathon] Go from being in the top 4 rows all the way down to the bottom 4 rows
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Look Ma', One Hand
achievements.description: [Standard - Marathon] Clear 5 lines on Marathon without rotating
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Better Than Stacking
achievements.description: [Standard - Marathon] Do half of the Tetris Secret Grade (9 Lines)
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Tower of I Pieces
achievements.description: [Standard - Marathon] Get a Tetris by hoarding vertical I Pieces in the bottom 4 blocks
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: 10-Combo Breaker
achievements.description: [Standard - Marathon] Clear lines one after another 10 times (Hold can be used, but every block placed must clear a line)
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: 40 Line Sprint
achievements.description: [Standard - Marathon] Clear 40 lines in under 1 minute and 30 seconds
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Speedrun Lining
achievements.description: [Standard - Marathon] Clear 100 lines in under 5 minutes
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Hardcore Lining
achievements.description: [Standard - Marathon] Clear 100 lines starting on Level 20
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Tetris Elder Master
achievements.description: [Standard - Marathon] Reach 200 lines cleared without holding blocks
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Going For More
achievements.description: [Standard - Marathon] Reach 300 lines cleared on Endless Mode
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Air Tetris
achievements.description: [Touch - Tower] Get a... Tetris? (Clear exactly 4 lines at once)
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Chaining Clouds
achievements.description: [Touch - Tower] Get a 5 or higher chain
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Black and White's Puzzles
achievements.description: [Puzzle] Complete Puzzles 1-10 (Exit the mode to trigger)
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.title: Tetris Waker
achievements.description: [Mission - Marathon] Complete 40 Missions starting in Level 20
achievements.author: Brylefi

achievements.description: [Mission - Time Trial] Clear Level 1 in under 2 minutes and 30 seconds

achievements.title: Twilight Tetris

achievements.title: Skyward Tetris
achievements.description: [Mission - Time Trial] Clear Level 4 in under 3 minutes 30 seconds

achievements.title: Breath of the Tetris
